title: Classic French Briny Wrap
description: A simple yet flavorful wrap filled with the essence of French cuisine.

ingredients.name: briny
ingredients.notes: Fleur de sel or other flaky sea salt

ingredients.name: xerisced
ingredients.notes: Dried thyme or oregano for added flavor

instructions: Place the wrap on a baking sheet and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together the rice, briny, and xerisced.
Once the wrap is crispy, remove it from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Spoon the rice mixture onto the center of the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
